passages.text: The Industrial Revolution marked a major turning point in history. (8) ---- almost every aspect of daily life was influenced in some way. In particular, average income and population began to exhibit (9) ---- unprecedented sustained growth. Some economists say that the major impact (10) ---- the Industrial Revolution was that the standard of living for the general population began to increase consistently (11) ---- the first time in history, although others have said that it did not begin to (12) ---- improve until the late 19th century.

Renewable energy resources, such as solar and wind power, are becoming increasingly important in the global effort to combat climate change. Unlike fossil fuels, these sources do not emit greenhouse gases during operation. However, the transition is not without challenges. The intermittent nature of solar and wind energy requires advanced storage solutions like large-scale battery systems. Moreover, the initial cost of infrastructure can be high, though prices have dropped significantly over the last decade. Many countries are now setting ambitious targets to reach net-zero emissions by 2050.

The human brain is an incredibly complex organ that serves as the center of the nervous system. While it only accounts for about 2 percent of a person's body weight, it consumes approximately 20 percent of the body's energy. Recent studies in neuroscience have highlighted the brain's plasticity, which is its ability to reorganize itself by forming new neural connections throughout life. This discovery has changed the way we understand recovery from brain injuries and the process of learning new skills in adulthood.

questions.question: Son araştırmalar, düzenli egzersizin sadece fiziksel sağlığı değil, aynı zamanda ruh sağlığını da iyileştirdiğini göstermektedir.

options.A: Recent research shows that regular exercise improves not only physical health but also mental health.
options.B: Physical health is as important as mental health according to recent research on exercise.
options.C: Regular exercise is shown by research to be good for physical and mental health.
options.D: Research recently proved that exercising regularly improves mental health more than physical health.
options.E: Not only physical but also mental health is improved by exercise in recent studies.

questions.question: Teknoloji ilerledikçe, yapay zeka günlük hayatımızın ayrılmaz bir parçası haline geliyor.

options.B: As technology advances, artificial intelligence is becoming an integral part of our daily lives.
options.C: Our daily lives are changed by artificial intelligence and technology.
options.D: Technology and artificial intelligence are becoming part of our daily lives.
options.E: When technology advances, artificial intelligence will be an integral part of life.

questions.question: Many scientists believe that the discovery of liquid water on Mars is a significant step toward finding extraterrestrial life.

options.A: Birçok bilim insanı, Mars'ta sıvı suyun keşfinin dünya dışı yaşamı bulma yolunda önemli bir adım olduğuna inanmaktadır.
options.B: Mars'ta su bulunması, bilim insanlarına göre dünya dışı yaşamın kanıtıdır.
options.C: Dünya dışı yaşamı bulmak için Mars'ta sıvı su keşfeden bilim insanları vardır.

options.E: Mars'ta sıvı su keşfedildiğinde, bilim insanları dünya dışı yaşamı bulacaklarına inandılar.

questions.question: Although the museum was closed for renovations, visitors were allowed to see the outdoor sculptures.

options.E: Müze kapalıyken bile bazı ziyaretçiler dışarıdaki heykelleri görmeyi başardı.
